title: lithocarpus eiadthongii
intro: Lithocarpus eiadthongii, also known as the Thai walnut tree, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the treatment of certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Lithocarpus eiadthongii typically involve drying and grinding the bark, leaves, or seeds into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules.
